releaseNotes: Toast notification system (top-right overlay, slide+fade animation)
Sidebar: badge counts on nav items, responsive auto-collapse below 900px
Toast: fixed rendering above dialog overlays
Fix: MaterialService now uses configurable thresholds instead of hardcoded 100/30
Multi-step Add Material wizard (Invoice → Select Type → New/Existing Form)
Multi-step Dispatch Material wizard (Invoice → Select Product → Dispatch)
